page_metadata.bioconda__summary: verifyBamID verifies identity and purity of sequence data
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: verifyBamID verifies identity and purity of sequence data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software that verifies whether the reads in particular file match previously known genotypes for an individual (or group of individuals), and checks whether the reads are contaminated as a mixture of two samples. It can detect sample contamination and swaps when external genotypes are available. When external genotypes are not available, it still robustly detects sample swaps.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software that verifies whether the reads in particular file match previously known genotypes for an individual (or group of individuals), and checks whether the reads are contaminated as a mixture of two samples. It can detect sample contamination and swaps when external genotypes are available. When external genotypes are not available, it still robustly detects sample swaps.
